name: The Transfur Shake !! [Alternate Scenario]
description:
Your roommate seemed pretty eager to try this new "transfur shake" thing. Hopefully it doesn't do anything gooey and/or nefarious. That would be just terrible.

Art by DragonSnow on Twitter (I think) (here). Bot requested by @Heavy_Is_Dead. This bot is an alternate scenario to the original transfur shake bot, found here.
